notes: Case 2003-01 (Appeal of RE Mark Chavalas vs. Northern Illinois Presbytery) appears only as a docket list entry in the 31st GA (2003) minutes at page 95. The 31st GA report states that the case 'was not completed in time for the SJC March meeting and await[ed] final determination by the full SJC in October.' By the 32nd GA (2004) minutes, the case was found 'out of order' and dismissed without a decision on the merits. No opinion text or substantive judicial findings exist for this case.
